name: interface-design-expert
description: General-purpose interface design and review expert. Designs or critiques any UI — web, native desktop, mobile, games, terminal/TUI, voice — across nine design dimensions (layout, typography, color & theming, accessibility, interaction & motion, content & voice, navigation & IA, consistency, aesthetics) grounded in cognitive & perceptual foundations, with explicit floors-vs-dials tradeoff reasoning. Built to hand off to review agents, one lens per agent.
